summary: Backend-only testing of Two-Way Messaging System for The Doggy Company. All 19 tests passed (100% success rate). User messaging, ticket creation, concierge replies, conversation history, and WhatsApp link generation all working correctly.

minor.issue: Empty message is accepted (no validation). Consider adding min_length=1 to message field in UserMessage model.

critical_code_review_comments: user_tickets_routes.py - Well-structured with proper async/await patterns
Admin notifications are correctly created when user sends message
Internal notes are properly filtered from user's conversation history
WhatsApp link generation correctly handles missing phone numbers (returns 400)
Ticket ID generation uses date-based format (TKT-YYYYMMDD-XXX) which is good for tracking
seed_data_creation: Test tickets created with TEST- prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two-way messaging system fully tested. All endpoints working: POST /api/user/request/{request_id}/message (creates tickets), GET /api/user/request/{request_id}/messages (conversation history), POST /api/user/ticket/{ticket_id}/concierge-reply (concierge replies), GET /api/user/ticket/{ticket_id}/whatsapp-link (WhatsApp link generation). User has 78 existing tickets. Email notification is configured (RESEND_API_KEY present in .env).

features_tested.user_send_message: PASS - Creates ticket with TKT-YYYYMMDD-XXX format
features_tested.get_conversation_history: PASS - Returns messages with sender='you' or 'concierge'
features_tested.concierge_reply_in_history: PASS - Reply appears in user's conversation
features_tested.internal_note_hidden: PASS - Internal notes not shown to user
features_tested.whatsapp_link_generation: PASS - Returns 400 if no phone, generates link if phone exists
features_tested.user_tickets_list: PASS - Returns 78 tickets for test user
features_tested.end_to_end_flow: PASS - Complete flow: user msg -> ticket -> concierge reply -> user sees reply

GET /api/user/ticket/{ticket_id}/whatsap.note: Returns 400 if no phone number, 200 with link if phone exists
